title: Quran, Sura 18: Al-Kahf
description: Sura 18 (Al-Kahf: The Cave) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 18 (Al-Kahf: The Cave) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Praise to God, who has sent down upon His Servant the Book and has not made therein any deviance. The companions of the cave were youths who believed in their Lord, and We increased them in guidance.
